title: Fuyutsukis office
wikitext:
[]: Fuyutsuki's office             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Feb 26, 2012 12:49 pm Why doesn't Fuyutsuki have an office as Gendō? What I mean is that he always stands behind Gendō as if he has nowhere else to go, which is puzzling for a high official in an organization.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Sun Feb 26, 2012 1:29 pm On TV shows, out of sight = out of mind for the viewers. It's the same reason that Captain Picard and Commander Riker are always on the bridge at the same time on Star Trek: The Next Generation. That, and the show uses Fuyutsuki for bits of exposition. Of course, that's because Gendo never says anything and Misato doesn't know WTF is going on behind the scenes for most of the series so it's pretty much by default.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Feb 26, 2012 1:42 pm svenge wrote: It's the same reason that Captain Picard and Commander Riker are always on the bridge at the same time on Star Trek: The Next Generation.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Feb 26, 2012 1:48 pm Fuyutsuki also doesn't have knees. Think about it dude, you never see him sit down. His entire lower body is a primitive cybernetic construct which can't actuate such a complex motion. Also, is it just me or did you use to have only one "l" in your name?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Feb 26, 2012 1:56 pm Azathoth wrote: Fuyutsuki also doesn't have knees. Think about it dude, you never see him sit down. His entire lower body is a primitive cybernetic construct which can't actuate such a complex motion.

[]: Re: Fuyutsuki's office             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Feb 26, 2012 1:57 pm We saw Fuyutsuki's office in episode 21.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 26, 2012 2:18 pm Azathoth wrote: Think about it dude, you never see him sit down.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Sun Feb 26, 2012 3:26 pm Also, during the power outage, when the tech staff are complaining of the heat and admiring Gendo and Fuyutsuki for their unflappability, there is a close-up of Fuyutsuki's feet soaking in a tub of water beneath the commander's seat on top of the MAGI.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 26, 2012 7:12 pm Jornophelanthas wrote: there is a close-up of Fuyutsuki's feet soaking in a tub of water beneath the commander's seat on top of the MAGI.

[]:             Quote Post by r0ach » Sun Feb 26, 2012 7:16 pm Reichu wrote: You see him sitting on the trains in #11 and #17, at the very least.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Feb 26, 2012 7:16 pm Reichu wrote: I don't recall seeing a Nerv office for Fuyutsuki in #21.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 26, 2012 7:24 pm r0ach: The office, and when he's drinking with the other teacher, and when he's tending that ghetto post-2I infirmary. Mr. Tines wrote: No, but he does have one in the university, pre-2I.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Feb 26, 2012 7:35 pm I'm sure he has one somewhere for when Gendo's brooding gets to be a bit too much and he has to do all that bothersome bookkeeping crap. It just isn't important because he isn't important to the story, and nobody ever goes to visit him there for any reason that Anno felt like putting to film.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Sun Feb 26, 2012 9:56 pm How do we know Fuyutsuki doesn't have an office? Maybe he goes there whenever he's not talking with Gendou.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sun Feb 26, 2012 10:05 pm I do not recall any scene to show or tell us that Fuyutsuki does or does not have an office. It is fair to assume his position would entail the use of an office, but it would likely be a spartan room kept similar to his office at the University in '21.

[]: Re: Fuyutsuki's office             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Mon Feb 27, 2012 3:41 am Allemann wrote: What I mean is that he always stands behind Gendō as if he has nowhere else to go, which is puzzling for a high official in an organization.

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Mon Feb 27, 2012 5:08 am Reichu wrote: Though I wonder how Fuyutsuki gets any work done without his own desk

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Feb 27, 2012 7:13 am Fuyutsuki not having his own office would make sense of a lot of things I never really questioned. Fuyutsuki can be periodically seen doing all manner of things beside Gendo's desk that I would think he'd do more naturally in an office of his own if he had one. He often seems to just be lounging around at the commander's desk. Even the Vice President of the US is not supposed to hang out in the Oval Office as much as Fuyutsuki does in Gendo's. It would also say a lot about their relationship, because of how peculiar it is. As I write more about them in a fic I'm doing I notice how much they often seem like an old married couple but this really takes the cake .

[]:             Quote Post by r0ach » Mon Feb 27, 2012 9:36 am Reichu wrote: r0ach: The office, and when he's drinking with the other teacher, and when he's tending that ghetto post-2I infirmary. Yeah, but... that's not what Al(l)eman was asking about.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Feb 27, 2012 12:15 pm Fuyutsuki likely has an office, but he never does anything interesting in there so we never have to see it.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Sun Feb 26, 2012 1:29 pm On TV shows, out of sight = out of
